name: Jiangsu Jinling Sports Equipment Co.,Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Jinling Sports Equipment Co.,Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells sports equipment worldwide. It offers equipment for various kinds of sports events, including basketball, football, volleyball, track and field, gymnastic, weightlifting, wrestling and judo, tennis, billiards, swimming, badminton, table tennis, handball and hockey, fitness, and fencing and boxing equipment, as well as equipment for disabled and optoelectronic products. The company also provides stadium construction, fitness, event security, and sports facility integration services. The company was founded in 1985 and is based in Zhangjiagang, China.
